title: Toycraft
body:
## What is Toy Craft?

Toy Craft is a decorative mod. It adds a number of different plushies and toys you can add to your Minecraft game.

## What toys exist within Toy Craft?

We have a list of ALL the toys currently included within Toy Craft on [our website](https://docs.lockyzmedia.com/toycraft/toylist)
 
## Where can I get help?

You can get help and information from [our Discord Server](https://discord.gg/NgpN3YYbMM)
